name: get_node_properties
description_lines: Get changed properties of one or more specific nodes in scene files.
Only shows properties that differ from defaults.

Large or opaque resources such as TileSet, TileMapLayer data, GridMap data, MeshLibrary resources, Theme resources, AnimationTree graphs, AnimationLibrary, Animation, and SpriteFrames are summarized into readable API-oriented output.
Use get_scene_tree first to find node paths.
Use get_class_info to inspect the full API surface before editing with run_scene_edit_script.
Hard limit: at most 5 targets per call.

targets.description: Node lookup targets to inspect in one call. Hard limit: at most 5 targets per call. Split larger batches into multiple calls.

node_path.description: Path to the node relative to scene root: '.' for root node, 'ChildName' for direct children, 'Child/GrandChild' for deeper nodes. Do NOT include the root node name in the path (wrong: 'Player/Sprite2D', correct: 'Sprite2D'). Run get_scene_tree first to see the node tree.
